channel.title: India's #1 Basketball Training Academy | IB Sports Academy
channel.description: Recent content on India's #1 Basketball Training Academy | IB Sports Academy

item.title: Disclaimer
item.description: The information provided on https://ibsportsacademy.com (“Website”) is for general informational purposes only. All information on the Website is provided in good faith; however, IB Sports Academy makes no representation or warranty of any kind, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, availability, or completeness of any information on the Website.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: At IB Sports Academy, accessible from https://ibsportsacademy.com, we are committed to protecting the privacy of our visitors, students, and users. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our Website or engage with our services.

item.title: Terms & Conditions
item.description: Welcome to https://ibsportsacademy.com (“Website”). These Terms & Conditions (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of the Website, including all content, features, services, and information provided by IB Sports Academy.

item.title: National Bronze for Shaurya Jindal
item.description: Shaurya Jindal secures 3rd Place at the Nationals, representing ITL Public School and IB Sports Academy.

item.title: National Silver for Naunit Goyat
item.description: Naunit Goyat secures the Silver Medal at the Under-14 National Basketball Championship.

item.title: Inter-Zonal Silver: Under-17 Girls Team
item.description: Team Zone 21 secures 2nd Place at the Inter-Zonal Basketball Competition.

item.title: World Cup: India Representative in Puerto Rico
item.description: Anshika represents India at the Special Olympics 3x3 Unified Basketball World Cup, securing 5th place globally.

item.title: Inter IB 4.0 • IB Sports Academy
item.description: The fourth edition of the Inter IB tournament brought together IB athletes for one of the most competitive in-house basketball events organized by IB Sports Academy.

item.title: All-India Podium: Thakur Memorial Trophy
item.description: Team ITL, guided by IB Sports Academy, finishes as 2nd Runners-Up at the 6th Thakur Memorial Trophy.

item.title: National Gold: Unified Basketball Championship
item.description: Delhi Unified Team strikes GOLD at the Special Olympics Bharat National Basketball Championship 2025.

item.title: Court to Championship • Coach Hassan El-Saddique
item.description: A high-energy USA-India collaboration featuring Hassan El-Saddique, focusing on pro-level skill development and motivational mentorship on the court.

item.title: Global Hoops Meet • Coach Malkom
item.description: An elite exchange of knowledge and passion as Coach Malkom (Uganda) brings African championship-level training to IB Sports Academy & Foundation athletes.

item.title: The Sunday Centre • Every Child, Every Dream
item.description: Our weekly Sunday Centre creates a safe, structured environment at ITL Public School where confidence and joy are built through inclusive basketball.

item.title:
Ranveer Singh Saini Inaugurates
Sunday Centre for Special Children
item.description: Special Olympian Ranveer Singh Saini joins Coach Ishwar Bhati to inaugurate a new era of inclusive basketball at ITL Public School, Dwarka.

item.title: Inter IB 3.0 • IB Sports Academy
item.description: The third edition of the Inter IB tournament brought together IB athletes for one of the most competitive in-house basketball events organized by IB Sports Academy.

item.title: National Silver: Bhumit Kumar (SGFI)
item.description: Bhumit Kumar secures 2nd place at the SGFI Basketball National Tournament (Under-17 Boys).

item.title:
The French Connection
Guillaume Soares & Benjamin Bari
item.description: An elite technical workshop bringing the French Pro-B league’s tactical standards to the youth athletes of IB Sports Academy.

item.title: Jr. NBA Delhi NCR Champions
item.description: Team IB clinches 1st place in the Jr. NBA Delhi NCR Tournament and represents Delhi at the National level.

item.title: Podium Finish: 66th National School Games
item.description: Aksh Solanki and Keshav Geer secure 3rd place at the prestigious 66th National School Games.

item.title: From Academy to Team India: Aryan
item.description: Former IB Sports Academy student Aryan fulfills the dream of representing India on the international basketball stage.

item.title: Poetry of Movement • Aerobics Tournament
item.description: A celebration of rhythm and athleticism, featuring talented participants from across New Delhi at DIS Edge-18, showcasing high-energy performances.

item.title: Basketball Clinic • Naoufal Uariachi
item.description: FIBA Instructor and Morocco National Team Coach Naoufal Uariachi leads an elite clinic for New Delhi’s underserved youth.

item.title: Community Outreach • Basketball for Change
item.description: Under the ‘Rise Through Hoops’ initiative, we provide weekly basketball training and professional gear to the students of Don Bosco Ashalayam.

item.title: Alumni Spotlight: Bhuvanesh Rajagopal
item.description: From IB Sports Academy to Iowa State University: Bhuvanesh reflects on the fundamentals that built his journey.

item.title: Best Coach - Reliance Foundation Jr. NBA
item.description: Selected as Best Coach and invited for an NBA experience trip to Shanghai, China.

item.title: Best Preceptor Award (2021-22)
item.description: Honored as the BEST PRECEPTOR by the Directorate of Education at the annual sports activities.

item.title: CBSE Observer for Basketball Cluster 20
item.description: Selected as CBSE Observer for the U-19 Boys Basketball Cluster event at St. Thomas School.

item.title: Champions of Khelo Masters Games 2019
item.description: The ‘Fighter Bulls’ stood as the winning team with Coach Ishwar Bhati as a core member.

item.title: Collaborate for Impact with IB Sports Academy
Contact • IB Sports Academy
Dr. B. R. Ambedkar Khel Ratna Award
item.description: Felicitation for tremendous contribution to Indian sports by the Government of India.

item.title: Gold Medal at 2nd Khelo Masters Games
item.description: Team Delhi secured the first position and a Gold medal in the 35+ age category.

item.title: Jr. NBA Coach for Delhi Girls Team
item.description: Leading the Delhi Girls team at the International Regional Junior NBA edition.

item.title: Meet The Team
National Coach for Delhi Boys Team
item.description: Coach Ishwar Bhati led the Delhi Boys’ Team to a strong 4th place finish at the 40th Youth National Basketball Championship.

item.title: NFPET National Best Coach Award
item.description: Honored with the Best Coach (Basketball) award by the National Federation of Physical Education Teachers.

item.title: Our Locations • IB Sports Academy
Outstanding Physical Education Teacher Award
item.description: Recognized for uplifting the standard of sports among students across India.

item.title: Outstanding Sports Academy • Education Excellence Award
item.description: IB Sports Academy was honoured with the Education Excellence Award 2025 for Outstanding Sports Academy, recognizing its commitment to developing young athletes.

item.title: Pay & Play Basketball in Delhi-NCR | Book on BookMyShow
PEFI Dr. Ajmer Singh Best Coach Award
item.description: Recognition of excellence in Physical Education and Sports at the 7th PEFI National Awards.

item.title: Rise Through Hoops • IB Sports Foundation

Who Is Ishwar Bhati?
item.description:
title: “About Coach Ishwar Bhati” date: 2025-05-27 author: “IB Sports Academy” cover: “/images/coach-ishwar-bhati-profile.jpg” summary: “Meet Coach Ishwar Bhati, the visionary founder and head coach of IB Sports Academy, dedicated to empowering youth and transforming Indian basketball.” tags: [“Ishwar Bhati”, “Head Coach”, “IB Sports Academy”, “Basketball India”, “Youth Empowerment”]

About Coach Ishwar Bhati

Founder & Head Coach, IB Sports Academy

Inspiring the Next Generation of Indian Basketball

Coach Ishwar Bhati is a trailblazer in Indian basketball coaching and the driving force behind IB Sports Academy. With over 15 years of experience, he has dedicated his life to empowering young athletes and transforming the landscape of grassroots basketball in India.
